spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-8, p-12, or p-16 for main sections. Internal container padding should be p-6 or p-8 minimum to prevent text collision.
spacing_and_layout.landing_page_grid: Mode A (Tetris Grid). Asymmetrical layout, wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Use span logic (col-span-8, col-span-4) to create tension.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B (Control Room Grid). For Analyzer and Generator pages. gap-4 or gap-6. Dense data, high scannability. Widget ratios like col-span-1 for summary, col-span-2 for charts.
spacing_and_layout.container_radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-full for pills and main buttons. Keep radius subtle to maintain the 'Performance' edge.

surfaces.cards: Flat background (#141414) with 1px solid border (#262626), no drop shadow by default. On hover: border brightens slightly or casts a subtle red glow (-translate-y-1 transition).
surfaces.glassmorphism: Only for Sticky Nav/Headers. bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-xl and border-b border-white/10.
surfaces.pricing_highlight: The Pro tier MUST use 'The Tracing Beam' or a glowing gradient border with #FF0000 to highlight it.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF0000] text-white font-bold tracking-wide rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all hover:bg-[#CC0000] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,0,0,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-[#262626] font-bold tracking-wide rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all hover:border-[#FF0000] hover:text-[#FF0000]

inputs.default: bg-[#0F0F0F] border border-[#262626] text-white rounded-lg p-3 focus:border-[#FF0000] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF0000] transition-colors

components.badges: bg-[#FF0000]/10 text-[#FF0000] border border-[#FF0000]/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

motion_and_interactions.hover: Always set hover text color (e.g., hover:text-white). Buttons MUST have a kinetic feel.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up animations for generated viral ideas and analyzer results (Framer Motion).

hero_background.description: Abstract dark cinematic background with subtle neon red geometric lines for the main landing page hero section.
hero_background.usage: Landing page hero section background layer, with opacity overlay bg-black/50 so text remains legible.

pricing_texture.description: Dark mode UI background texture with subtle red glowing light bleed.
pricing_texture.usage: Background layer for the Pricing page.

analyzer_feature.description: Cinematic close-up of a high-end YouTube creator studio in a dark room with red glow.
analyzer_feature.usage: Feature showcase image for the 'Video Failure Analyzer' section on the landing page.

icons.usage: Use crisp, stroke-based icons. Use Lucide React (already installed).

landing_page.headline: Stop Guessing. Start Going Viral.
landing_page.design_instructions: Hero section must use the hero_background image with a dark overlay. Centralize the massive headline (text-6xl+). Emphasize the CTA 'Start Generating Ideas' in primary red.

viral_idea_generator.inputs: Niche (text), Target Audience (text), Language (Dropdown: English, Hindi, Spanish, French, Portuguese, Arabic).
viral_idea_generator.outputs: Grid of 10 Idea Cards. Each card includes: Title, Hook (15-sec), Thumbnail Concept (text/visual representation), Viral Score (/10) prominently displayed, Best Upload Time.
viral_idea_generator.design_instructions: Use Mode B Control Room Grid. Cards must feel tactile. Highlight the 'Viral Score' using the red accent color or glowing text.

video_failure_analyzer.outputs: Score / 100 (prominent circular progress or large stat), 3-5 reasons for underperformance with actionable fixes, Improved Title suggestion, Better Thumbnail concept.
video_failure_analyzer.design_instructions: Use a Dashboard layout. The score out of 100 should be the visual anchor. Underperformance reasons should be displayed as a list of actionable insights with error/warning colors.

pricing_page.design_instructions: Use pricing_texture as background. 3-column bento grid. The 'Pro' tier MUST stand out with a 1px solid red border and a subtle red drop shadow (glow). Use the 'Most Popular' badge on Pro.

auth.design_instructions: Minimalist Login and Signup pages. Centered form, deep black background, red primary button.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="generate-ideas-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `@phosphor-icons/react` if complex icons are needed, otherwise stick to `lucide-react`.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for the marketing landing page structure. DO NOT use generic Shadcn layout components for the marketing page. Build custom, asymmetrical grids.
Use Shadcn UI for the forms, inputs, dropdowns, and dashboards (Generator and Analyzer output). Heavily customize Shadcn borders and backgrounds to match the #141414 / #262626 dark theme.
Ensure 'Inter' is NOT used for headings. Use 'Outfit'.
Integrate Supabase for auth and Stripe for payments as requested.
Implement the free limits (3 generations/week, 1 analysis/week) tracking in Supabase.
Do NOT use pure #000000 background everywhere, use #0A0A0A (Obsidian) for depth.
Adhere strictly to WCAG AA contrast ratios, especially for text placed on dark red.
